questions.question: During a client-side navigation (clicking a NuxtLink), which middleware type runs?
options: Both server middleware and route middleware
Neither: no middleware runs on client navigation

questions.question: Can route middleware protect an API endpoint from unauthorized access?
options: Yes, route middleware blocks all requests including API calls
No: route middleware only affects page navigations, not direct API calls
Yes, but only if marked as .global

questions.question: In server middleware, how do you read cookies from the incoming request?
